parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid webhook payload. Expected PR event with action opened or synchronize.', received_action: $json.body.action || 'none' }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO code_reviews (pr_number, repo, author, branch, title, sha, security_score, performance_score, practices_score, composite_score, verdict, security_findings, performance_findings, practices_findings, ai_model, execution_time_ms) VALUES ({{ $json.prNumber }}, '{{ $json.repo }}', '{{ $json.author }}', '{{ $json.branch }}', '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.sha }}', {{ $json.securityScore }}, {{ $json.performanceScore }}, {{ $json.practicesScore }}, {{ $json.compositeScore }}, '{{ $json.verdict }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.securityFindings).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb, '{{ JSON.stringify($json.performanceFindings).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb, '{{ JSON.stringify($json.practicesFindings).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb, 'claude-sonnet-4-6', {{ $json.executionTimeMs }}) RETURNING id, composite_score, verdict;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ commit_id: $node["Compute Review Score"].json.sha, body: $node["Compute Review Score"].json.reviewBody, event: "APPROVE" }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ commit_id: $node["Compute Review Score"].json.sha, body: $node["Compute Review Score"].json.reviewBody, event: "COMMENT" }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ commit_id: $node["Compute Review Score"].json.sha, body: $node["Compute Review Score"].json.reviewBody, event: "COMMENT" }) }}

parameters.url: ={{/* REPLACE WITH YOUR SLACK WEBHOOK URL */ 'https://hooks.slack.com/services/YOUR/SLACK/WEBHOOK'}}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, reviewId: $node['Store in PostgreSQL'].json.id || 'generated', verdict: $node['Compute Review Score'].json.verdict, compositeScore: $node['Compute Review Score'].json.compositeScore, scores: { security: $node['Compute Review Score'].json.securityScore, performance: $node['Compute Review Score'].json.performanceScore, practices: $node['Compute Review Score'].json.practicesScore }, totalFindings: $node['Compute Review Score'].json.totalFindings, executionTimeMs: $node['Compute Review Score'].json.executionTimeMs }) }}
